query: UPDATE matches SET matchDate = '2026-05-16 21:00:00', confirmationDeadline = '2026-05-16 18:00:00', arrivalDeadline = '2026-05-16 20:45:00' WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM matches ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1);
